entities.name: AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH NETWORKS
entities.description: Tools for strengthening agricultural research in developing countries by using existing facilities and staff more effectively to avoid duplication of effort

entities.name: DEVELOPING COUNTRIES
entities.description: Regions where agricultural research networks are utilized to strengthen research capabilities

entities.name: NATIONAL AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH SYSTEM
entities.description: National agricultural research bodies (NARS) that interact with international centers through networks

entities.name: INTERNATIONAL AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH CENTERS
entities.description: International bodies (IARCs) that use networks to expand information bases and share materials with NARSs

entities.name: ASIAN GRAIN LEGUMES NETWORK
entities.description: A specific network (AGLN) that facilitates collaborative research on groundnut

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop Arachis hypogaea which is the focus of collaborative research via AGLN and Working Groups

entities.name: WORKING GROUPS
entities.description: Focused groups used by the AGLN to strengthen and focus collaborative research on groundnut

entities.name: COLLABORATIVE RESEARCH
entities.description: Research effort shared across networks to solve specific problems at a relatively low cost
